name: AIBOM emitter ingests the fine-tunes registry and includes each artifact in the bom output
command: mkdir -p prompts compliance && printf 'fine_tunes:\n  - {artifact_id: ft-1, base_model: sonnet, training_data: ds-1, license: MIT}\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom-emit.sh" --fine-tunes prompts/fine-tunes.yaml --out compliance/aibom.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"artifact_id":"ft-1"' compliance/aibom.json && grep -q '"base_model":"sonnet"' compliance/aibom.json && echo ok 1>&2
